title: Node Full Onboarding Metadata
description: Admin-submitted node-owned endpoint and UI metadata for initial onboarding or later registration metadata refresh. Core-owned identity, trust, governance, MQTT, and budget fields are intentionally excluded.

metadata_schema_version.description: Schema version for this metadata payload.

hostname.description: Operator-visible node host hint. This may be a hostname, host:port, or null when unknown.

ui_endpoint.description: Absolute node-owned UI endpoint requested by the node. This is retained as request metadata and may be null when the node should not expose independent UI.

api_base_url.description: Absolute node API origin or API base. Core normalizes a URL without a path to /api.

ui_enabled.description: Whether Core may expose the node-owned UI through the legacy node UI proxy. Core-rendered UI does not require this to be true.

ui_base_url.description: Canonical node-owned UI base URL when legacy proxied UI should be enabled, or null when no independent UI is served.

ui_mode.description: Rendering mode for the node-owned UI.

ui_health_endpoint.description: Optional absolute health endpoint for the node-owned UI proxy health check.
